curator_note: Bengaluru's screens this week are basically a UN General Assembly of cinema — Kannada, Tamil, Telugu, Malayalam, Hindi, English, and anime all showing up simultaneously, proving that this city's cultural appetite is less 'niche taste' and more 'yes, all of it, now.'
